ruleset: Old-School Essentials Advanced Fantasy class reference plus Carcass Crawler goblin, using Dolmenwood save labels
sourceBasis: Old-School Essentials Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome v1.3 class level progression tables, printed pages 29, 31, 33, 35, 37, 39, 41, 45, 47, 49, 51, 53, 55, 57, 61, 63, 65, 67, 69, 71, 73, 75
Carcass Crawler Issue #1 goblin class level progression table, printed page 11
Dolmenwood save labels mapped to OSE saving throw categories by project decision; OSE D/W/P/B/S values are unchanged.
excludedByDesign: Only xpThreshold, attackBonus, saves, spellSlots, and maxSpellLevel are included in class level records.

incomplete.status: excluded from audited official rules data
incomplete.reason: Aliases such as abbreviations or alternate spellings are app convenience data, not class table source data.

auditNotes: Audited against the uploaded Old-School Essentials Advanced Fantasy Player's Tome class progression tables and Carcass Crawler Issue #1 goblin progression table.
Removed alias arrays because they contained app-convenience strings not directly sourced from official class table names.
Class ids are app-facing identifiers; displayName contains the official class name used for rule lookup.
Hit dice, skills, turn undead, class features, racial abilities, and individual character state remain intentionally excluded.
